source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
rationale: 0.60% premium driven by soft, thematic headlines (AI, iPhone sales) with no material overnight catalysts; typical sentiment-driven noise likely to revert as institutional order flow sets the open.

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
rationale: Competitive laptop/AI chip news and mixed analyst views typically drive short-term sentiment rather than fundamental repricing; the -0.67% overnight dip likely reflects liquidity/sentiment noise that should revert at the open.

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
rationale: Modest 0.94% premium driven by WWDC/AI catalyst speculation and analyst upgrades rather than fundamental overnight shocks. Typical off-hours sentiment drift likely to normalize at open when institutional liquidity returns.

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
rationale: 0.63% premium driven by routine/backward-looking headlines and minor congressional trades; no material overnight catalysts to justify sustained repricing, typical low-liquidity overnight sentiment likely to arbitrage away at open.

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
rationale: Modest 0.67% premium driven by pre-WWDC AI hype and analyst speculation rather than concrete fundamentals; typical sentiment-driven drift likely to normalize at open liquidity.

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json

source: artifacts/aaplusdt-news-aware-backtest.json + data/aaplusdt-gate-verdicts.json
